questionHtml: Explain the role of lactose in the expression of the gene for lactase production.
markschemeHtml:
1. lactose binds to repressor protein;
  2. repressor protein (with lactose bound) cannot block/bind to the promoter/Y;
  3. RNA polymerase/X binds to the promoter/transcribes the gene;
  4. lactase produced (if lactose present)/lactase production inhibited if lactose absent;

Accept the converse of mpa to mpd with lactose absent.

meta.title: Explain the role of lactose in the expression of the gene for lactase production.
